'''Michael Smith''' (born 10 May 1976) is a New Zealand [[rugby union]] and [[rugby league]] footballer who played in the 1990s and 2000s. He played representative level rugby union (RU) for [[North Harbour Rugby Union|North Harbour]].<ref name=coffey>Coffey and Wood ''The Kiwis: 100 Years of International Rugby League'' {{ISBN|1-86971-090-8}}</ref> and representative level rugby league (RL) for [[New Zealand national rugby league team|New Zealand]], and at club level for [[Canterbury Bulldogs]], [[Castleford Tigers]] (twice), [[Hull FC|Hull Sharks]], [[York Wasps|York]], [[Hull Kingston Rovers]], [[Barrow Raiders]] and [[Te Atatu Roosters]].<ref name="Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk">{{cite web|url=http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=34|title=Statistics at thecastlefordtigers.co.uk|date=31 December 2013|access-date=1 January 2014|url-status=dead|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20120421170915/http://www.thecastlefordtigers.co.uk/playerprofile.php?pid=34|archive-date=21 April 2012}}</ref>
